steps.title: Use the poem's direction
steps.content: The name 'breathes bravery and life and courage to the tribe' sends those qualities outward to the people. The replacement word must mean conveys or gives.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice B means gives up or rejects. Choice C means agrees. Choice D means takes in, which is the opposite direction from giving courage to the tribe. Imparts means passes on or bestows, matching the context. The answer is A.
